productDisplayName: Puma Women Wirko White Casual Shoes
description: A stylish jogging and walking shoe, the puma Wirko is packed with features to enhance your performance and help you shape up faster with ease. Team this with performance clothes when hitting the track or the gym, or simply wear it with jeans and tees  to look your casual best.   UpperSynthetic leather upper with contrast coloured synthetic overlays on the sides for durability and midfoot support puma Leaping cat as medial overlay for enhanced shoe structureAdded overlay at the heel for durability and support Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and fabric collar for in-step comfort and snug fitMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort, durability and impact protection Padded footbed for all-day comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves for grip and traction Terraced grooves on the toe region for added grip Mildly curved forefoot for better traction Puma branding and Leaping Cat as lugs for inner-arch support and grip
